name: stupid-ai
description: stupid-ai — Claude Code plugins for AI work that should not drift: auto-loop plans, explicit human gates, and auditable execution.

plugins.name: human-plan
plugins.description: An auto-looping Human Plan workflow: turn one request into a checked plan, stop at confirm/approve gates, implement after approval, and audit the result.

plugins.name: human-prompt
plugins.description: A prompt-alignment loop that turns short requests into approved Prompt Briefs for execution context.
